provisions.title: Citation and commencement
provisions.content: These By-laws may be cited as the Missungwi District Council (Ferry Fees) By-laws, 2002 and shall come into operation after the approval of the Minister and published in the Government Gazette .

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these By-laws, unless the context otherwise requires: " Director " means any person for the time being holding the position or acting in the capacity of the District Executive Director and includes his deputy. " Council " means the Missungwi District Council; " Revenue Officer " means any person whether an employee or an agent duly authorized to collect fees in accordance with these By-laws. " Person " means a natural person and legal person whether corporate or incorporate body of person. " Animals " includes any cattle, oxen, donkeys, camels, goats, sheep, cows, poultry, ducks, and horses being carried or transported to the other shore of the lake; " Commercial vehicle " means any motor vehicle constructed or adapted for use and used for the conveyance of goods and passengers.

There shall be levied and collected from every passenger(s), owner of bicycles, motorcycles, vehicles or livestock travelling, or moving through Usagara Kigongo Ferry to Sengerema a fee to be known as Ferry fee as specified in the schedule to these By-laws.

Any person or owner of a motor cycle tricycle, vehicle or livestock who contravenes or fails to comply with any of provisions of these By-laws shall be guilt of an offence and shall on conviction be liable to a fine not exceeding three hundred thousand (300,000/=) or to imprison­ment for term not exceeding twelve months or to both such fine and imprisonment. Schedule No. First Column Second Column 01. Passengers 50/= @ Passenger 02. Bicycle 50/= @ bicycle 03. Motorcycle 50/= @ motorcycle 04. Cattle and or donkey 50/= @ cattle/donkey 05. Goat and or sheep 50/= @ goat/sheep 06. Poultry (hen or cock) 20/= @ hen or cock 07. Pick up and Land Rover not exceeding 2 tons 150/= @ pickup/landrover 08 Min bus carrying up to 15 passen­gers or equivalent car 300/= @ bus/equivalent car 09. Lorries not exceeding 7 tons 300/= @ lorry/bus 10. Lorries exceeding 7 tons and bus carrying 45 passengers 300/= @ lorry/bus/vehicle 11. Lorries exceeding 15 tone 300/= @ lorry/vehicle 12. Heavy plants, truck and trailer 500/= @ truck/vehicle History of this document 24 May 2002 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 21 Commenced 12 February 2002 Assented to Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
